2. Definitions
The term software indicates the computer programs listed in the Subject chapter of this Agreement in the present form as well as in any other machine-readable form; it also includes all the updates as well as the backup copies prepared by the Licensee.
The following should not be considered as Third Parties: the Licensee's collaborators and also those who come to be with the Contracting Parties to make use of the software in compliance with the provisions of the Agreement.

3. Object of this agreement
Software:
- Quality System document archiving program
- Archiving program Communications between the various corporate bodies
- Report filing program between the various entities
User license agreement: transfer of the enjoyment of the program for a fee or not, but not for the rights of economic use such as the resale of the same.

4. Protection of copyright
The software is protected by copyright. the author and Calvi Tecnologie s.r.l. which reserves all rights.

5. Content of this Agreement
The subject of this Agreement is the use of software by the Licensee for consideration.
Pursuant to this Agreement, use means any total or partial copy or transfer of the software to an electronic data processing system (IBM compatible PC with Windows NT, 2000, 2003, XP, Vista, Win7, Win8, WIN 10, WIN 11 and Mac OSX) for the amount of machine commands and instructions contained therein.
The Licensee is not authorized to pass the license to third parties or to grant sub-licenses.

6. Licensee's Rights
During the term of this Agreement, Licensee is authorized to use the software in accordance with the Agreement.
He can reproduce the software if this is necessary in order to use the software itself, which happens in relation to the installation of the program on the disk of the hardware used as well as in relation to the loading of the program on the working memory.
In addition, the Licensee may make a reproduction for safety reasons. However, he is allowed to produce only one archival copy, which must be kept. This security copy must be marked as such and kept in a safe place and not accessible to third parties.
Licensee is not permitted to make further reproductions.

7. Obligations and responsibilities of the Parties for the duration of this Agreement

Obligations of the Grantor
Supply of software as well as a software key and number relating to version 1.xx at the expense of the Grantor at the beginning of this Agreement.
Provision of technical support, by telephone or e-mail in Italian, English or German, free of charge if it does not exceed what is normal;
Provision of a free periodic update, which includes intermediate improvements (up to version 2) and program updates.

Liability of the Grantor
Guarantee of exemption from legal defects.
The users, for whom the Grantor carries out its business, have never suffered damage in the use of the software. However, it can happen that the software has defects. The Grantor undertakes to eliminate such defects as soon as possible, in addition to this he assumes no responsibility.
The defects presented by the software will be eliminated within 10 days from the supply after the respective communication by the Licensee, by repair or replacement supply, at the Choice of the Grantor. Transport costs will be borne by the Grantor. The repair or replacement supply will take place within 14 days from the date on which the Grantor became aware of it. In case of absence for holidays or business trips of the Grantor, any delays may result.
The Grantor is not liable for any loss of data, installation, use, results obtained, choice and use of software, machines and services; the relative responsibility lies with the Licensee who will carry out specific periodic data backups.

Obligations of fulfillment and obligations of omission by the Licensee
Payment of the license fee. It must be carried out Una-Tantum, on the day of the commencement of this Agreement.
The Licensee must refrain from any action which, following the use of the software, may lead to the fact that others or the Licensee himself gain an advantage in terms of economic competition without the Grantor being rewarded with the payment of the relative price as well as with the Inclusion in an Agreement - as long as the Licensee abides by this Agreement as a Contracting Party, he will of course be free to use the subject matter of this Agreement to improve his market position.
He must provide for the absolute exclusion of Third Parties from the objects of this Agreement for the duration of this Agreement, after the termination of this Agreement as well as after the finding of nullity or the verification of the non-existence of a contractual obligation;
He must refrain from disseminating the software on the Internet, Intranet or through other networks;
He must refrain from multiple uses. The Licensee may use the software on any hardware used by the Licensee. If you change the hardware, he is required to delete the software from any hardware used so far. It is not allowed to simultaneously store, stock or use the software on more than one hardware. Should the Licensee wish to use the software simultaneously on several hardware configurations, he is obliged to purchase the respective number of software packages.

Before any sale, assignment or various disposition of the software or various data media, the Licensee must delete the software contained therein.
Do not make any changes to the program; any program change leads to a shutdown.
Decompilation (re-translation of the licensed program code into other forms of code) as well as reverse engineering (other reconversions of the various phases of the software manufacturing process) are not allowed;
Under no circumstances is it permitted to remove or modify the author's notes, serial numbers as well as the various characteristics designed to identify the product.
The Licensee is required to ensure the fulfillment of its contractual obligations by taking appropriate preventive measures and informing all people who have access to the software.

8. Irregularities in the Agreement

Delays
In the event of late payment, the Grantor will urge Licensee to pay within 10 days, after which the Grantor has the right to cancel this Agreement.

Other violations
In the event of a breach of the contractual provisions by the Licensee or by persons for whom he is responsible with consequent damages for the Grantor, the Licensee is required to pay damages regardless of whether the fault lies with him or not.

Conventional penalty
Should the Licensee violate any of the obligations with consequent circumvention of the provisions relating to the protection of the Licensor's software, the Licensee is required to pay a conventional penalty to be defined in relation to the case of violation.
The payment of the conventional penalty does not exempt from compliance with the provisions of this Agreement.
The conventional penalty may be requested simultaneously with any compensation for damages, any improper profit and rights.
The payment of the contractual penalty is due in any case in which there is a violation of the above-mentioned obligations, that is to say also in the event that this Agreement for any reason should not (or should no longer) be in force. .

9. Commencement of this Agreement
The contractual relationship begins on the date of purchase of the software and has an indefinite duration.

10. Expiration of this Agreement
Termination of this Agreement
It remains reserved to exercise the right of extraordinary termination, which may take place for serious reasons. In particular, there are serious reasons in the following cases: breach by one of the Contracting Parties of a contractual obligation contained in this Agreement as well as the unsuccessful expiry of a period of 10 days following the warning expressed by the other Contracting Party (the latter case only if there is a breach of obligations to perform; in the event of a breach of obligations not to do, the termination of this Agreement may be requested immediately).
In the event of an application for a declaration of bankruptcy or an arrangement with creditors regarding the assets of the other Contracting Party or suspension of payments; in the event of a substantial change in the control level of the other Contracting Party, especially in the case of acquisition or substantial influence by a third company; for the Licensor in the event that the suitability of copyright protection or the confidentiality of the licensed software is contested. It is not possible to list all the examples of serious reasons as it is not possible to predict them.

Effect
With the termination of this Agreement, all rights of the Licensee relating to the use of the software cease.
The Licensee undertakes to return the software to the Licensor within one week of the termination of this Agreement, which he must do by means of a registered shipment. Delivery to the Grantor will be borne and at the risk of the Licensee. The termination of this Agreement does not exempt from the observance of the obligations not to do as well as from the payment of the contractual penalty by the Licensee. In the event of a violation of this contractual provision, there is also a violation of the copyright of the Grantor. See also the provisions under the heading "Delays".

11. Choice of law
This Agreement is subject to Italian substantive law.

12. Jurisdiction
At the choice of the Grantor, the competent court is the District Court of Lecco.

13. Exclusion of verbal agreements
Verbal agreements are not valid simultaneously with this Agreement.
Any changes to this Agreement require written form.

telegram_already_linked: This Telegram account is already linked to another user
telegram_help_note: Important note: Your Telegram ID is different from your "Username" (which starts with @). The ID is a unique and permanent numeric code that the system uses to identify your account.
telegram_help_step1: Open Telegram: Go to the app on your smartphone or open Telegram Web/Desktop.
telegram_help_step2: Use the search bar: Search for the bot @userinfobot (or a very valid alternative is @getmyid_bot).
telegram_help_step3: Start the bot: Select the bot from the search results and press the "Start" button at the bottom (or type /start and send the message).
telegram_help_step4: Read your ID: The bot will instantly reply with a message. You will find a line that says Id: 123456789 (that numeric sequence is your unique Telegram ID).
telegram_help_title: How to find your Telegram ID
